items.title: Bitcoin’s biggest quantum risk may not be wallet keys. An early investor fears something bigger
items.summary: Andrew Gault, the venture capitalist who funded the quantum hardware labs now threatening bitcoin, says the industry is looking in the wrong place. Google's own security team moved in the same direction in March.

items.title: Clarity Act Risks Regulation Without Oversight, Brookings Fellow Says
items.summary: As Congress weighs crypto legislation, Aaron Klein says the CFTC needs more resources, independence and coordination to oversee digital markets.

items.title: Bitcoin underperforms risk assets as record 9th day of ETF outflows signal waning demand
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for May 29, 2026

items.title: Ethereum analysts say ‘downside pressure’ remains as $1.8K becomes key
items.summary: Analysts warn Ether’s downside risks remain elevated as traders closely watch the $1,800 support zone for stability.

items.title: Why is Stellar's XLM up by over 50% this week?
items.summary: XLM rallied after US financial giant DTCC announced a partnership with the Stellar Network, but it still risks a sharp downside in the coming weeks.

items.title: Bitcoin, ether, XRP, dogecoin lag a nine-week stocks rally as ETF demand cools
items.summary: The S&P 500 posted its longest weekly winning streak since 2023 and Brent oil stabilized near $92 on US-Iran ceasefire hopes. The biggest cryptocurrencies still drifted lower, with Hyperliquid's HYPE the only major name to rally.

items.title: Bitcoin retail sentiment still matters, says Swan Bitcoin CEO
items.summary: Swan Bitcoin CEO Cory Klippsten said it is important to pay attention to retail sentiment around Bitcoin, as ownership is still far from concentrated and “it’s not like Blackrock owns the Bitcoin.”

items.title: ‘The banks will not accept it’: Dimon escalates battle over stablecoin rewards in CLARITY Act debate
items.summary: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon criticized Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong and warned the current CLARITY Act framework could ultimately fail, as banks and crypto firms clash over whether stablecoin issuers should be allowed to offer yield-bearing rewards that resemble bank deposits.

items.title: U.S. regulator says 24/7 trading is great for crypto, may not be fit for other sectors
items.summary: As the CFTC issued landmark approvals for crypto perpetual futures contracts, it explained in a related advisory that round-the-clock activity isn't right for all.

items.title: Mass deployment of AI agents is a disaster waiting to happen, says CertiK CEO
items.summary: Ronghui Gu shares tips on how to isolate AI agents while testing them so they do not have access to critical personal information or digital assets.

items.title: Live markets: Bitcoin shrugs off early decline, but two-month winning streak is in jeopardy
items.summary: A hopeful posting on Iran from President Trump helped erase morning losses.

items.title: What American crypto asset perpetuals mean for the future of crypto
items.summary: For years, one of the most significant crypto asset markets has existed entirely outside the United States. Today, that changes, explains CFTC Chairman Selig.

items.title: U.S. CFTC opens crypto 'perp' door with first approvals at Kalshi, Coinbase
items.summary: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission has now established a stance on how regulated U.S. firms can engage in crypto perpetual futures contracts.

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bittensor (TAO) drops 4%, leading index lower
items.summary: Internet Computer (ICP), down 3.8%, was also an underperformer.

items.title: Paxos wins SEC approval to clear U.S. stocks on blockchain
items.summary: Paxos new license positions it alongside legacy giants such as DTCC and makes it a compelling, more efficient alternative for traditional finance giants than legacy competitors.

items.title: Hyperliquid bigger than NASDAQ, says ICE CEO Jeffrey Sprecher
items.summary: Sprecher saluted Hyperliquid's team, signaling deeper engagement between Wall Street incumbents and crypto-native rails.

items.title: Bitcoin ETF outflows reach record 9-day streak as investors pull $2.8 billion
items.summary: The longest run of withdrawals since U.S. spot bitcoin ETFs listed in January 2024 comes as bitcoin underperforms high-flying AI and semiconductor stocks.

items.title: Bitcoin slides to April lows as crypto diverges from record-chasing U.S. equities
items.summary: Bitcoin's failed breakout above $83,000 is looking increasingly like a bear market signal, even as S&P 500 and Nasdaq futures notch gains and approach all-time highs.

items.title: Kalshi follows CFTC in suing Minnesota over law criminalizing prediction markets
items.summary: The Governor of Minnesota signed into law a measure that, starting Aug. 1, makes it a crime to advertise and operate prediction market platforms across the state.

items.title: Strategy's STRC slips below $99 as Strive captures investor attention
items.summary: STRC has struggled to maintain its $100 target price, while Strategy's reduced cash reserves and dividend obligations are drawing increased investor attention.
